content: In this lecture, Ian Ball discusses interactive decision-making, in which there are multiple players making decisions. He explains extensive-form games, strategy, and strategic-form games.
title: Lecture 2: Representation of Games

video_metadata.video_tags: 14-12-economic-applications-of-game-theory-fall-2025, extensive-form game, interactive decision-making, strategic-form game, strategy
video_metadata.youtube_description:
MIT 14.12 Economic Applications of Game Theory, Fall 2025 
Instructor: Ian Ball 
View the complete course: https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/14-12-economic-applications-of-game-theory-fall-2025/
YouTube Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLUl4u3cNGP63quuKvMHCt3cmTmt0O2qpv

In this class, Ian Ball discusses interactive decision-making where you have multiple players making decisions. He explains extensive-form games, strategy, and strategic-form games.
